extension.description: Kodi-Repository mit eigenen Addons (inkl. Kodi4Seniors) sowie gepflegten externen Quellen und Forks wie plugin.video.themoviedb.helper.
Kodi repository with own add-ons (including Kodi4Seniors), maintained external sources, and forks like plugin.video.themoviedb.helper.
extension.news: Added plugin.video.themoviedb.helper as a mildman1848-maintained fork and published plugin.audio.audiobookshelf 0.1.48.
